# [Remote] AI Collaboration Specialist

Note: The job is a remote job and is open to candidates in USA. Corpay is currently looking to hire an AI Collaboration Specialist for their corporate overhead division. This early-career role focuses on supporting the implementation, adoption, and measurement of AI- and data-driven productivity solutions across the company's lines of business, helping knowledge workers integrate AI tools into their workflows.

Senior Data Scientist with experience delivering end-to-end machine learning solutions that drive measurable business impact. My work focuses on pricing optimization, revenue growth, and applied AI. My background covers the full ML lifecycle, from data exploration to production deployment and monitoring: using Python, SQL, AWS, and in my previous roles Azure. results.title: Corpay AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
highlights:
Corpay has positioned itself as a comprehensive corporate payments company leveraging AI and automation across multiple business functions. The company rebranded from FLEETCOR to Corpay in 2024 to better reflect its expanded portfolio beyond fleet cards [1]. Throughout 2025, Corpay has demonstrated strong AI adoption through practical applications in customer service, fraud detection, and operational efficiency [2][3]. The company's strategic focus includes AP automation, cross-border payments, and virtual card programs, with AI playing an increasingly important role in enhancing these services [4][5]. Corpay's CIO Scott duFour has positioned AI as critical infrastructure rather than mere automation, emphasizing its role in customer retention, cybersecurity, and development processes [6].
...
## AI Hiring Signals
...
Corpay Job Postings Analysis
...
Tech Roles (Engineering/Data) 4.5%
...
Corpay shows interesting hiring signals with 8.7% of jobs mentioning AI. Notably, non-tech roles show higher AI expectations (10.6%) than tech roles (4.5%), suggesting AI skills are valued across customer-facing and business functions. Customer service leads with 25% AI mentions, aligning with their known AI chatbot implementations.

results.title: Senior Manager, Strategic Marketing – SmithCareers
highlights:
What We NeedCorpay is looking to hire a Senior Manager, Strategic Marketing within our Payables division. This position reports to the EVP of Marketing Strategy and supports the Corpay Commercial Cards business. In this role, you will sit at the center of Product, Sales, and Marketing, defining go-to-market strategies that drive growth. You will help sharpen our positioning, identify the right customer segments, and guide how new solutions are introduced to the market. This is a highly visible role for a strategic marketer who enjoys connecting the dots, influencing stakeholders, and turning complex offerings into clear, compelling value for customers.
...
- Demonstrated ability to effectively use generative AI platforms (e.g., ChatGPT, Copilot) to enhance productivity, research, documentation, and problem-solving.
...
Use of Artificial Intelligence in HiringCorpay may use artificial intelligence (AI) and other technology-enabled tools to support certain aspects of the recruitment process, such as application screening, candidate assessment, or interview scheduling. These tools are designed to enhance efficiency, consistency, and fairness throughout the hiring process. AI tools do not make final hiring decisions. All employment decisions involve human review. Corpay is committed to the responsible use of AI, including appropriate oversight and safeguards designed to support fair and unbiased outcomes.

results.title: Shiva kumar Vuppala
highlights:
Senior Data Engineer | Technical Lead | Data Architecture | SQL Server | ETL | Informatica | Financial Data Platforms | PCI DSS | Machine Learning Researcher
...
Sr. SQL Developer Tech Lead at [Corpay](https://www.linkedin.com/company/corpay)
...
I am a Senior Data Engineering and Financial Technology professional with over 11 years of experience designing, developing, and optimizing enterprise-scale data platforms, financial systems, ETL architectures, and business intelligence solutions. Throughout my career, I have contributed to organizations including Corpay, Microsoft, United Airlines, United Wholesale Mortgage, and ChenMed Healthcare, delivering data-driven solutions that improve operational efficiency, financial performance, data security, and regulatory compliance. At Corpay, I serve as a Senior SQL Developer and Technical Lead supporting critical financial systems that process millions of transactions and influence significant revenue-generating operations. My work includes leading enhancements to enterprise late fee and interest calculation platforms, ensuring accurate financial assessments, regulatory compliance, and scalable processing for large customer portfolios. I have also driven rebate optimization initiatives processing approximately 10 million records monthly, reducing execution times and improving operational efficiency through automation, validation frameworks, and performance tuning. In addition, I have led PCI DSS 4.0 tokenization initiatives, enterprise data migrations, secure file transfer modernization programs, and large-scale data warehouse transformation efforts. My expertise spans SQL Server, Data Engineering, Data Architecture, ETL Development, Informatica, Azure Data Services, Business Intelligence, Data Security, Financial Technology, and Machine Learning applications. I am passionate about building secure, scalable, and intelligent data platforms that enable organizations to make better decisions, improve financial outcomes, and accelerate digital transformation.
...
### Sr. SQL Developer Tech Lead at [Corpay](https://www.linkedin.com/company/corpay) (Current)
...

The Sr Staff AI Scientist - Generative AI will apply knowledge and experience to real world problems and seek to utilize their skills reduce the cost of healthcare and improve health quality and outcomes. With access to dedicated on premise and cloud based big data solutions, the team can work with a vast amount of structured and unstructured data including claims, membership, physician demographics, medical records and others to begin to solve some of the most pressing healthcare issues of our time. A Data Scientist at Cotiviti will be given the opportunity to work directly with a team of healthcare professionals including analysts, clinicians, coding specialists, auditors and innovators to set aggressive goals and execute on them with the team. results.title: [Remote] Senior Generative AI Scientist II | Wfh
highlights:
# [Remote] Senior Generative AI Scientist II
...
Note: The job is a remote job and is open to candidates in USA. Cotiviti is a healthcare technology company focused on delivering better care at lower costs through advanced technology and data analytics. The Senior Generative AI Scientist II will work with a team to solve healthcare issues using machine learning and AI techniques, delivering value through innovative data solutions. Responsibilities • Work with key stakeholders within Research and Development as well as Business Operations, along with Product Management to assess the potential value and risks associated with business problems that have the potential to be solved using machine learning and Artificial Intelligence techniques • Develop an exploratory data analysis approach to verify the initial hypothesis associated with potential Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning use cases • Document your approach, thinking and results in standard approaches to allow other data scientists to collaborate with you on this work • Prepare your final trained model and develop a validation test set for QA • Work with ML Ops/Production operations to deploy your model into production and support them in monitoring model performance • Participate in design sessions to continuously develop and improve the Cotiviti machine learning platform • Participate in other data science initiatives, collaborating with your peers to support their projects • Participate in knowledge sharing sessions to bring new insights and technologies to the team • Provide End to End value-based solutions, including data pipeline, model creation and application for end user consumption • Complete all responsibilities as outlined in the annual performance review and/or goal setting • Complete all special projects and other duties as assigned • Must be able to perform duties with or without reasonable accommodation Skills • Graduate degree in a quantitative discipline such as Computer Science/Engineering, Statistics, Operations Research covering Advanced Statistics, Machine learning and AI • Experience with the latest techniques in natural language processing including transformers, fine-tuning LLMs, measuring/benchmarking and deploying LLMs with tools such as HuggingFace, Langchain, LLAMA/Mistral and OpenAI, vector databases • 5+ years of hands-on data science/AI experience, using typical machine learning and data science tools including pandas, scikit-learn, keras, nltk, and TensorFlow/PyTorch, GPU • Experience building production-grade machine learning deployments on AWS, Azure, or GCP • Experience working with Apache Spark™ and large-scale distributed datasets • Experience communicating technical concepts to non-technical and technical audiences is a plus • Flexibility to work with global teams as well geographically dispersed US based teams • Professional with ability to properly handle confidential information • Ability to work within a matrixed organization • Proficiency in all required skills and competencies above Benefits • Medical • Dental • Vision • Disability • Life insurance coverage • 401(k) savings plans • Paid family leave • 9 paid holidays per year • 17-27 days of Paid Time Off (PTO) per year, depending on specific level and length of service with Cotiviti. Company Overview • Cotiviti enables healthcare organizations to deliver better care at lower cost through advanced technology and data analytics that improve the quality and sustainability of healthcare in the United States. It was founded in 1979, and is headquartered in South Jordan, UT, US, with a workforce of 5001-10000 employees. Its website is Company H1B Sponsorship • Cotiviti has a track record of offering H1B sponsorships, with 165 in 2025, 118 in 2024, 90 in 2023, 102 in 2022, 72 in 2021, 67 in 2020. Please note that this does not guarantee sponsorship for this specific role.

...

...
Lead model deployment for experimentation, implementing A/B testing, monitoring model performance, and iterating on solutions based on empirical results.
...
Work closely with AI engineers, software developers, product managers, and other data scientists to deliver end-to-end AI-enabled solutions.
...
Experience with training models or utilizing foundation models and fine-tuning them to meet custom business requirements.
